name: gcs-score-input
title: GCS Score Input
description: Glasgow Coma Scale entry with three descriptor radiogroups, live total, severity band, and NT support.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled { eye, verbal, motor } where each is a number, "NT", or null.

props.name: defaultValue
props.default: { eye: null, verbal: null, motor: null }

clinicalNotes: Always report the component breakdown, never the bare total: the same GCS 10 from E4 V1 M5 versus E2 V4 M4 means very different things, so the breakdown ("E3 V4 M5 = 12") is always shown. Each component carries its standard descriptor because scoring from memory is error-prone. `NT` (not testable — e.g. a swollen-shut eye or an intubated patient who cannot be assessed verbally) suppresses the naive numeric total rather than silently counting it as a low score, which would fabricate a worse GCS; report the component with NT (verbal-NT is conventionally written with a T suffix). Severity bands (≤8 severe, 9–12 moderate, 13–15 mild) are guidance, not a disposition. The total updates in an aria-live region and each option is a labelled radio with arrow-key navigation.
notes: medcn-original, client (three controlled radiogroups). Built from primitives; NT suppresses the sum.
